first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations, and the core reasoning remains consistent. Both versions praise the candidate's extensive technical experience and entrepreneurial spirit while noting the same concern: a lack of explicit high-level AI/cloud strategy experience. The minor differences in phrasing are attributable to normal model variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the switch from European/international locations to U.S.-only locations.
